name: ammas-kitchen-print
description: Print pipeline for Amma's Kitchen — emits Typst documents from the existing recipe loaders and compiles two press-ready PDFs (Volume I & II).

scripts.compile: typst compile out/book-vol1.typ dist/book-vol1.pdf --root .. --font-path assets/fonts && typst compile out/book-vol2.typ dist/book-vol2.pdf --root .. --font-path assets/fonts
scripts.build: npm run emit && npm run compile && npm run cover
scripts.watch: tsx build.ts && typst watch out/book-vol1.typ dist/book-vol1.pdf --root .. --font-path assets/fonts
